resources.string: La kan nawajo\' nayuj re rutzijol re\'? Man tikirel ta nitzolïx.
Katoka\' richin nasamajij ri ab\'ey pa k\'aslemal
Katzolij oxi\' k\'utunïk jujun q\'ij richin ye\'amolo\' ri XP!
Ke\'awila\' ri k\'olib\'äl chuqa\' ri yab\'il winäq wawe\'!
Tatz\'aqatisaj ri rutzijol pa ruk\'isib\'äl ri q\'ij.
Ke\'atzu\' ri taq silowachib\'äl chuqa\' tab\'ana\' ri taq moloj k\'utunïk!
Ke\'asik\'ij ri taq tijonik chuqa\' ke\'amolo\' XP toq ye\'atz\'aqatisaj!
Tak\'utuj chi re Fred, ri ato\'onel pa k\'aslemal, achike k\'utunïk nawajo\'!
Taq Rayb\'äl ri Jun Chik Wuqu\' Q\'ij
Ri taq jaloj xkeximon toq xatok pa k\'amaya\'l
Man xetikirel ta xesamajïx ri taq k\'utunïk
Man etaman ta ruwäch ri sachoj
Xe\'awila\' %1$d chi ke ri %2$d taq k\'utunïk!
Ri ak\'olib\'äl richin re q\'ij re\'!
Man k\'o ta ak\'olib\'äl richin wakami.
Ri ak\'olib\'äl nrokisaj GPS toq ya\'on q\'ij.
Tatz\'aqatisaj ri atzijol jujun q\'ij richin naya\' ketal ri asamaj chuqa\' ye\'amolo\' XP!
Tawetamaj ri ruwäch chuqa\' rusamaj ri male reproductive system
Tawetamaj ri ruwäch chuqa\' rusamaj ri female reproductive system
Tawetamaj ri taq ruwach\'ulew, rusamaj, chuqa\' jutaqil taq yab\'il chi rij ri urinary system
Tawetamaj ri wuqu\' taq ruxaq richin nab\'an ütz ruch\'ajik q\'ab\' richin nichajïx ri yab\'il

# Ütz Ruch'ajik Q'ab'

## Achike Ruma K'atzinel Ruch'ajik Q'ab'
Ri ruch'ajik q'ab' jun chi ke ri nimaläj taq rub'eyal richin nichajïx ri yab'il.

## Ri Wuqu' taq Ruxaq

1. **Taya'a' ya'** chi kij ri aq'ab'
2. **Takuyu' jabón** chuqa' tak'ojo' ütz
3. **Tach'ajo' ri aq'ab' chi kixo'l**
4. **Tach'ajo' chi kikojol ri arï'**
5. **Tach'ajo' ri chi rij ri aq'ab'**
6. **Tach'ajo' chuxe' ri arixk'aq**
7. **Tab'ana' ütz ruch'ajik rik'in ya'**

## Achike Ora' Nik'atzin Nach'aj Aq'ab'
- Chuwäch nanuk'u' ri wa
- Chuwäch natij ri wa
- Chi rij nawokisaj ri ja
- Chi rij nakoq'ej o naxik'a'
- Chi rij nachäp ri taq chicop

## Jarupe' Ramaj
Tach'aja' aq'ab' jun juwinäq segundo — achi'el nab'ïx ka'i' mul ri "Happy Birthday"!
Tawetamaj ri achike nik\'atzin chi ke ri ak\'wala\' richin ütz nik\'ïy

# Ütz Wa'im Richin Ak'wala'

## K'atzinel taq Ruwäch Wa'im

### 1. Proteína
- Kinäq', lenteja, endecha, kar, tib'aj
- Nikiköl ri ch'akul chuqa' nikito'o' ri nik'ïyik

### 2. Wanga
- Ixim, arroz, papas, kaxlan wa
- Nikikowin nikiya' ruchuk'ab' richin jujun q'ij

### 3. Ruwäch Che' chuqa' Ichaj
- Q'ana' ichaj, mango, sek, tomate
- K'ïy taq vitamina chuqa' minerales k'o chi kik'in

### 4. Ruk'wa' Wakax
- Ruk'wa' wakax, yogur (we k'o)
- Richin ko'öl taq b'aq chuqa' eje'

## Taq Na'oj Richin Wa'im
- Taya' jalajöj taq ruwäch wa jujun q'ij
- Takuyu' ruwäch che' chuqa' ichaj rik'in k'ïy taq rub'onil
- Tajikib'a' chi k'o ronojel ri nik'atzin
- Taya' ch'ajch'öj ya' richin nitij
K\'atzinel taq na\'oj richin ruk\'aslemal ri nan toq k\'o rak\'wal

# Richajinik K'aslemal Chuwäch Ri Aläxik

## Jutaqil Rutz'etik
Katb'e pa kowilab'äl man jun ta kaji' mul toq k'o ri ak'wal:
- Jun mul pa ri nab'ey oxi' ik'
- Jun mul chi kikojol ri kaji' - waqib' ik'
- Ka'i' mul pa ri ruk'isib'äl oxi' ik'

## Wa'im Toq K'o Ak'wal
- Tanimaj ri wa'im
- Taya' hierro chuqa' ácido fólico
- Katuk'a' k'ïy ch'ajch'öj ya'

## Taq Retal Itzel
Tatzukuj to'ïk we:
- Nïm k'axk'ol pa jolom
- Man ütz ta natz'ët
- Kik'el nipe
- Nïm k'axk'ol pa pamaj
- Ri ak'wal man nisilïx ta

## Richajixik Malaria
- Katwär chuxe' malla richin sik'
- Taya' ri kunaj achi'el nib'ïx
Tawetamaj achike ora\' chuqa\' achike ruma k\'atzinel ri taq tz\'u\' chi ke ri ak\'wala\'

# Rub'ey Kitz'u' Ak'wala'

## Toq Xaläx
- BCG (tuberculosis)
- Polio 0

## 6 Wuqu' Q'ij
- Polio 1
- Pentavalent 1
- PCV 1

## 10 Wuqu' Q'ij
- Polio 2
- Pentavalent 2
- PCV 2

## 14 Wuqu' Q'ij
- Polio 3
- Pentavalent 3
- PCV 3

## 9 Ik'
- Sarampión
- Fiebre Amarilla

## Achike Ruma K'atzinel ri Taq Tz'u'
Ri taq tz'u' nikichajij ri ak'wala' chi kiwäch ri nimaläj taq yab'il chuqa' nikito'o' ri kik'aslemal.
Taq rub\'eyal richin nichajïx ri malaria pa ri atinamït

# Richajixik Malaria

## Rokisaxik Malla Richin Sik'
- Katwär chuxe' malla rik'in kunaj
- Tachojmirisaj ri taq jul aninäq
- Taya' kunaj chik pa waqib' - kab'lajuj ik'

## Richajinik Rulewal
- Telesäx ri ya' k'o wi
- Taya' ütz chi re ri ak'olib'äl
- Taq'ata' ri q'ayïs naqaj chi re ri ja

## Aninäq Rutz'etik
Tawila' ri taq retal:
- K'atan
- Tew
- K'axk'ol pa jolom
- K'axk'ol pa ch'akul

## Kunaj
- Tatzukuj to'ïk aninäq
- Tatz'aqatisaj ronojel ri kunaj
- Katuxlan chuqa' katuk'a' ya'
Taq rub\'eyal CPR richin nito\'on ri k\'aslemal kichin nimaläj winäq chuqa\' ak\'wala\'

# Ruq'ij CPR

## Achike Ora' Nab'an CPR
- Ri winäq man k'o ta retamab'al
- Man nuxlan ta o k'ax nuxlan
- Man k'o ta ruchukul kik'el

## Taq Ruxaq Richin Nimaläj Winäq

### 1. Tawokoj To'ïk
Tawokoj ri ajto'onel aninäq

### 2. Taya' Ruk'ojlib'al
Takana' ruwäch pa jun ko'öl k'ojlib'äl

### 3. Taya' Aq'ab'
Pa runik'ajal ri ak'u'x, chi kikojol ri taq k'u'x

### 4. Taq Tz'ub'uxïk
- Tatz'ub'uj rik'in ruchuk'ab' chuqa' aninäq
- Man jun ta ka'i' pulgada runimirisaxik
- Rajilab'al: 100-120 pa jun ch'uti ramaj
- 30 taq tz'ub'uxïk

### 5. Taq Ruxla'n Rito'ik
- Tak'oso' ri jolom chi rij
- Tajotob'a' ri xäk'äl
- Taya' ka'i' uxla'n

### 6. Tab'ana' Jun Chik
Tatikïr chik: 30 taq tz'ub'uxïk, ka'i' uxla'n

## Richin Ak'wala'
- Tawokisaj jun q'ab' richin ri taq tz'ub'uxïk
- Ko'öl runimirisaxik: achi'el ka'i' pulgada
- Junam rajilab'al: 30:2

Ütz apetik! Yin Fred, ri ato\'onel AI pa k\'aslemal richin AfyaQuest. Yin k\'o wawe\' richin yinto\'on awik\'in pa tijonik pa k\'aslemal, taq na\'oj richin natijon, chuqa\' achike na k\'utunïk chi rij ri k\'oja\'. Achike yitikïr yinto\'on awik\'in wakami? \uD83D\uDE0A

Ütz apetik! \uD83D\uDE0A Yin Fred, ri ato\'onel AI pa k\'aslemal. Yin k\'o wawe\' richin yinto\'on awik\'in pa tijonik pa k\'aslemal, taq na\'oj richin natijon, chuqa\' achike na k\'utunïk chi rij AfyaQuest. Achike yitikïr yinto\'on awik\'in wakami?

Ütz k\'utunïk chi rij ruch\'ajik q\'ab\'! \uD83E\uDDFC Tanataj ri wuqu\' taq ruxaq: taya\'a\' ya\', takuyu\' jabón, tach\'ajo\' ri aq\'ab\', chi kikojol ri arï\', chi rij ri aq\'ab\', chuxe\' ri arixk\'aq, chuqa\' tab\'ana\' ütz ruch\'ajik rik\'in ya\' jun juwinäq segundo. Re\' jun chi ke ri nimaläj taq rub\'eyal richin nichajïx ri yab\'il!

Yalan k\'atzinel richajixik malaria! \uD83E\uDD9F Ri nimaläj taq rub\'eyal rija\': katwär chuxe\' malla rik\'in kunaj, telesäx ri ya\' k\'o wi, taya\' ütz chi re ri ak\'olib\'äl, chuqa\' tatzukuj to\'ïk aninäq we yetz\'etetäj ri taq retal (k\'atan, tew, k\'axk\'ol pa jolom). Junelïk tatz\'aqatisaj ronojel ri kunaj we ya\'on chawe.

Yalan k\'atzinel ri taq tz\'u\' richin kik\'aslemal ri ak\'wala\'! \uD83D\uDC89 Ri ak\'wala\' nik\'atzin nikik\'ul ri taq tz\'u\' toq ye\'aläx (BCG, Polio 0), pa 6 wuqu\' q\'ij, 10 wuqu\' q\'ij, 14 wuqu\' q\'ij (Polio, Pentavalent, PCV), chuqa\' 9 ik\' (Sarampión, Fiebre Amarilla). Re taq re\' nikichajij chi kiwäch nimaläj taq yab\'il!

Yalan k\'atzinel ri ütz wa\'im! \uD83E\uDD57 Ri ak\'wala\' nik\'atzin proteína (kinäq\', endecha, kar), wanga (ixim, arroz), ruwäch che\' chuqa\' ichaj (q\'ana\' ichaj, mango), chuqa\' ruk\'wa\' wakax we k\'o. Taya\' jalajöj taq ruwäch wa, taq wa\'im rik\'in k\'ïy rub\'onil, chuqa\' k\'ïy ch\'ajch\'öj ya\' jujun q\'ij.

La nawajo\' ye\'amolo\' ch\'aqa\' chik XP? \uD83D\uDC8E Tatz\'aqatisaj ri ak\'utunïk jujun q\'ij (30 XP pa jujun ütz tzolin tzij), tataq ri taq atzijol jujun q\'ij (50 XP), tatz\'aqatisaj ri taq tijonik (50-100 XP), chuqa\' ke\'atzu\' ri taq silowachib\'äl! Junelïk tib\'an ri asamaj richin ch\'aqa\' chik XP. Yatikïr!

Ri junamiläj ja ri asamaj jujun q\'ij! \uD83D\uDD25 Katoka\' chuqa\' tab\'ana\' man jun ta jun samaj jujun q\'ij richin najikib\'a\' ri ajunamiläj. Ri nïm taq junamiläj nikiya\' ch\'aqa\' chik XP chuqa\' nik\'ut ri awochoch pa tijonik. Man tayuj ta ri b\'ey!

Matyox chawe! \uD83D\uDE0A Yin junelïk k\'o wawe\' richin yinto\'on awik\'in pa ri ab\'ey pa tijonik. Junelïk tab\'ana\' ri ütz asamaj achi\'el Ato\'onel pa K\'aslemal pa Tinamït — yab\'anon jun nimaläj jaloj pa ri atinamït! Junelïk tak\'utuj chwe achike nawajo\'.

Ri CPR jun samaj richin nito\'on ri k\'aslemal! \uD83D\uDEA8 Tanataj: tatz\'eta\' we ri winäq man k\'o ta retamab\'al chuqa\' man nuxlan ta, tawokoj to\'ïk, takana\' ruwäch, taya\' aq\'ab\' pa runik\'ajal ri ak\'u\'x, taya\' 30 taq tz\'ub\'uxïk (100-120/ch\'uti ramaj, ka\'i\' pulgada runimirisaxik), k\'a te ri\' ka\'i\' uxla\'n. Tab\'ana\' jun chik ri 30:2.

Jun ütz k\'utunïk! Yin k\'o wawe\' richin yinto\'on awik\'in pa tijonik pa k\'aslemal, taq na\'oj richin natijon, chuqa\' rub\'eyik ri k\'oja\'. La yatikïr nab\'ij chwe achike nawajo\' nawetamaj? Yitikïr yinto\'on awik\'in pa taq ruwäch achi\'el ruch\'ajik q\'ab\', wa\'im, richajixik malaria, taq tz\'u\', CPR, ruk\'aslemal nan, chuqa\' ch\'aqa\' chik! \uD83D\uDCDA
Kojakuyu\', xink\'ül jun sachoj. Tab\'ana\' utzil, tatojtob\'ej jun chik.
Man k\'o ta taq rutzijol etaqon. Tataq ri anab\'ey rutzijol jujun q\'ij!
Tab\'ana\' utzil, tatz\'aqatisaj ronojel ri k\'atzinel taq k\'ojlib\'äl
Ri animaläj man jani\' nuya\' ta samaj chawe. ¡Tatzolij pe jun chik!
Man xtikirel ta xesamajïx ri taq ya\'oj
Sachoj pa k\'amaya\'l. Tab\'ana\' utzil, tatojtob\'ej jun chik.
K\'o jun sachoj xk\'ulwachitäj. Tab\'ana\' utzil, tatojtob\'ej jun chik.
Man xtikirel ta ri tok. Tajikib\'a\' ri taq awetamab\'al.
